name: accent_dot_ruby_base_unknown

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 negative case: a ruby close 》 butts the directive, so there is no reclaimable Latin run (dot-over-ruby-base is not representable in a text-only forward leaf, the bouten-over-ruby limitation). The directive stays Directive{Unknown}, rendered as a hidden raw span and serialized verbatim.

source: 語《かたり》［＃mは上ドット付き］

expected.html: 語(かたり)［＃mは上ドット付き］
expected.serialize: 語《かたり》［＃mは上ドット付き］
